sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5076" key="*)ambraki/des" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀμβρακίδες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n5076.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ambracian women's shoes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:94" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.94</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
